questions.question: E-commerce компания: 10M events/day, нужен real-time fraud detection (latency менее 5 sec). Какой streaming stack?

options.text: Kafka (ingestion, partitioned by user_id для ordering) → Flink (stateful stream processing, event time windows, checkpointing) → alert service. Flink для low-latency stateful processing.
Direct API calls от каждого сервиса к fraud detector

questions.studyHint: Повторите уроки 1-2: Kafka Architecture и Flink Watermarks
questions.explanation: Kafka: ordered event ingestion (key=user_id for per-user ordering). Flink: stateful processing (track user behavior patterns), event-time windowing (sliding window over last 5 min of user activity), checkpointing (exactly-once). Sub-5-sec latency achievable with Flink event-at-a-time processing.

questions.question: Flink job получает events из Kafka. Некоторые events приходят с 10-minute delay (mobile devices с плохим интернетом). Tumbling window = 5 min. Как обработать late events?

options.text: Игнорировать late events — они не важны
Set allowed lateness = 15 min. Late events обновят already-fired window results (accumulating mode). Events позже 15 min → side output (DLQ) для separate processing
Увеличить window до 15 min (чтобы вместить все late events)
Использовать processing time вместо event time

questions.studyHint: Повторите урок 2: Flink — Watermarks и late data handling
questions.explanation: Allowed lateness: window fires at watermark, but remains 'open' for lateness period. Late events update window result. Very late events (beyond lateness) → side output for investigation. Increasing window (c) reduces granularity. Processing time (d) gives wrong results. Ignoring (a) loses data.

questions.question: В Kafka, если producer отправляет messages с key=null, все messages попадут в одну partition.
questions.explanation: key=null → Kafka uses round-robin (or sticky partitioning in newer versions) to distribute messages evenly across ALL partitions. This gives best throughput/distribution but NO ordering guarantees between messages. For ordering: must set explicit key.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок 1: Kafka Architecture — Partitioning и Key-based Routing

questions.question: Flink job с exactly-once semantics пишет результаты в Kafka. Checkpoint interval = 1 min. Job упал и перезапустился. Что произойдёт с данными?

options.text: Все данные потеряны после последнего checkpoint
Дубликаты в output — Kafka не поддерживает exactly-once
Flink автоматически удалит старые данные из Kafka

Flink восстановит state из последнего checkpoint, переиграет events из Kafka (consumer offset восстановлен). Two-phase commit: uncommitted records в Kafka будут aborted. Результат: exactly-once end-to-end, потеря = 0, дубликаты = 0

questions.studyHint: Повторите урок 2: Flink — Checkpointing и Exactly-Once Semantics
questions.explanation: Flink exactly-once with Kafka sink: checkpoint сохраняет operator state + Kafka producer transaction ID. При recovery: rollback к checkpoint, Kafka transaction abort (uncommitted records невидимы consumers). Re-process from saved offset → commit new transaction. End-to-end exactly-once через two-phase commit protocol.
